items.title: i often think about the irony of how "tools for thought" people spent like a decade makin…
items.title_zh: 我经常想到具有讽刺意味的是，人们如何花费十年的时间来制作“思想工具”……
items.description: i often think about the irony of how "tools for thought" people spent like a decade making cool pretty demos with canvases and then got completely mogged by low contrast poorly designed CLIs just winning because they do commodity thinking…
items.description_zh: 我经常想到具有讽刺意味的是，“思想工具”人们花了十年的时间用画布制作酷炫漂亮的演示，然后完全被低对比度、设计糟糕的 CLI 所困扰，只是因为他们进行商品思维而获胜......

items.title: Small tip: You can use Claude Code with computer use to set up Claude Tag.
items.title_zh: 小提示：您可以使用Claude Code与计算机一起使用来设置Claude Tag。
items.description: Small tip: You can use Claude Code with computer use to set up Claude Tag. Just point it to the Claude Tag docs and it will connect your team’s GitHub repo, data warehouse, google drive, and other data sources for you!
items.description_zh: 小提示：您可以使用Claude Code与计算机一起使用来设置Claude Tag。只需将其指向 Claude Tag 文档，它就会为您连接您团队的 GitHub 存储库、数据仓库、Google Drive 和其他数据源！
